what_this_case_proves: Adobe-style duplicate WN tokens at the same coordinate collapse to one base device.
Legend / detail pages are kept as rejected candidates but never count.
T1.00 SERVICE LEVEL is rejected by NOT IN SCOPE.
Multi-floor sheets apply correct multipliers (T1.06=9, T1.09=2, T1.10=5).
Homerun zone notes parse to IDF / MDF targets and trigger ambiguity / OCR-typo warnings.
recommended_command: python -c "from pathlib import Path; from app.takeoff.pipeline import build_low_voltage_takeoff; print(build_low_voltage_takeoff(Path('real_data_cases/LOWVOLT_002_MARRIOTT_ATLANTA_T/artifacts/2026-04-10 100% DD - MARRIOTT ATLANTA - T.pdf')).summary['wireless_node_outlet'])"
